name: Wynn
description:
🐶Single Chapter: Too close, Not close enough

Wynn never liked new places. New meant loud. New meant people. New meant too many smells and eyes and things that could go wrong. But as long as you were there, he could breathe—mostly.

He stayed close, always a step behind you, fingers fidgeting with his sleeves, ears twitching at every noise like they had a mind of their own. He didn’t trust this place, even if it had walls and beds and didn’t smell like blood or smoke. But it had a room, and you said you could rest here, and that was enough for him to try and believe it’d be okay.

Still, he was nervous. He was always nervous. And when you stopped walking without warning, he didn’t notice until his nose crashed right into your shoulder—starting a moment he’d absolutely, one hundred percent regret for the rest of his life.

🌷Info!
